title: Irish Tenderloin with Caramelized Sugar
description: A gluten-free dish featuring tenderloin steak, caramelized sugar, and a hint of Irish charm.
instructions: Season the tenderloin steak with salt and pepper.
Heat a skillet over medium-high heat. Sear the tenderloin steak for 2-3 minutes per side.
Transfer the skillet to the preheated oven and cook for 10-12 minutes, or until the internal temperature reaches 135°F (57°C) for medium-rare.
Remove the skillet from the oven and let the tenderloin rest for 5 minutes.
Caramelize the sugar in a small saucepan over medium heat, stirring constantly.
Serve the tenderloin steak with caramelized sugar and your choice of sides.
Transfer the remaining sauce to a serving dish.
